_comment: Reference shape for a pipeline-authored, fully-tagged story. Rich SETUP in body; CLEAN FORK in the gate options. The order of options in each gate's `choices` array IS the fixed display order (stored as choices.position), shown identically to every player. One of the gates is an anchor (immutable, recurs unchanged forever). Loadings are a PRIOR stamped with framework_version_id.
title: The Reference
body: Maya has managed Theo for two years. He is kind, tries hard, and is — by every honest measure — not good at the job. He has just asked her to be a reference for a role he desperately wants and, she suspects, also cannot do. He is the family's only earner this month.

gates.body: The hiring manager calls. 'Would you recommend him without reservation?' The honest answer is no. The kind answer is yes.

choices.label: Vouch for him. He needs the chance more than the manager needs the caveat.
Tell the truth, gently. The manager asked you a straight question.

gates.body: Later, Theo asks what you said. (An exploratory beat — this tension isn't cleanly one of the spine axes.)
gates.process_frame_note: v2: on a [PROCESS] beat, tag each answer's cni_role (consequences|norms|inaction). On a [DEFECT] beat, mark the costed self-interest option is_defection:true with a self_enhancement loading. Never put a defection option on an anchor gate.

choices.label: Tell him exactly what you told the manager.
Soften it to protect the working relationship.
Say nothing and let it blow over.
Quietly take the credit for the good outcome with your boss.
